requirements_addressed: ManifestRegistry is an ABC — cannot be instantiated directly
register() upserts — re-registering replaces previous entry
register() raises ValueError if manifest.intents is empty
deregister() is idempotent — no error if agent_id unknown
get() returns None for unknown agent_id
All methods are async — awaitable even without I/O
All modified files pass lint/format checks with zero errors

completion_promises.criterion_text: ManifestRegistry is an ABC — cannot be instantiated directly
completion_promises.evidence: ManifestRegistry uses abc.ABC as base class with @abc.abstractmethod on all 6 methods (register, deregister, get, list_all, find_by_intent, find_by_tool). Tests verify TypeError on direct instantiation and presence of all abstract methods in __abstractmethods__.

completion_promises.criterion_text: InMemoryManifestRegistry.register() upserts — re-registering the same agent_id replaces previous entry
completion_promises.evidence: InMemoryManifestRegistry.register() stores manifest in _store dict keyed by agent_id, so re-registration naturally overwrites. Test test_register_overwrites_existing registers two manifests with same agent_id and verifies the second replaces the first.

completion_promises.criterion_text: InMemoryManifestRegistry.register() raises ValueError if manifest.intents is empty
completion_promises.evidence: register() checks 'if not manifest.intents' and raises ValueError with message 'at least one intent capability is required'. Test test_register_empty_intents_raises verifies ValueError is raised with matching message.

completion_promises.criterion_text: InMemoryManifestRegistry.deregister() is idempotent — no error if agent_id unknown
completion_promises.evidence: deregister() uses dict.pop(agent_id, None) which silently returns None for missing keys. Tests verify no error on unknown agent_id and double-deregister.

completion_promises.criterion_text: InMemoryManifestRegistry.get() returns None for unknown agent_id
completion_promises.evidence: get() uses dict.get(agent_id) which returns None for missing keys. Test test_get_unknown_returns_none verifies this behavior.

find_by_intent() uses 'cap.pattern == intent' for exact string comparison. Changed from fnmatch glob matching to exact matching per task spec. Test test_find_by_intent_exact_not_glob verifies that pattern 'software.*' does NOT glob-match 'software.build' but DOES match 'software.*' exactly.
find_by_tool() uses 'tool.name == tool_name' for exact string comparison. Tests verify exact match, no match, multiple agents, and multiple tools scenarios.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All methods are async — InMemoryManifestRegistry must be awaitable even without I/O
completion_promises.evidence: All 6 ABC methods and all 6 InMemoryManifestRegistry methods are declared with 'async def'. TestRegistryMethodsAreAsync class has 6 tests using inspect.iscoroutine() to verify each method returns a coroutine. All async tests use await.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check passes with zero errors on all modified files: src/nats_core/manifest.py, src/nats_core/client.py, tests/test_manifest.py, tests/test_fleet_client.py.
